all.en: I had just downloaded a new dating app last weekend out of curiosity.
all.zh: 上個週末我出於好奇剛下載了一款新的交友軟體。

all.en: After swiping for an hour, I finally matched with someone named Daniel.
all.zh: 滑了一小時後，我終於和一位叫丹尼爾的人配對成功。

all.en: His profile said he loved hiking, jazz music, and homemade pasta.
all.zh: 他的個人檔案寫著他熱愛健行、爵士樂和手工義大利麵。

all.en: I sent him a simple hello and asked about his favorite trail.
all.zh: 我傳了一句簡單的哈囉，並問他最喜歡的健行路線。

all.en: He replied within minutes, which made me feel more confident.
all.zh: 他幾分鐘內就回覆了，讓我覺得更有信心。

all.en: We chatted about our hometowns and our jobs for almost two hours.
all.zh: 我們聊了將近兩個小時，談到家鄉和工作。

all.en: He seemed polite, funny, and not too eager to ask for personal details.
all.zh: 他似乎有禮貌又風趣，也沒有急著問私人細節。

all.en: At the end, he suggested grabbing coffee at a quiet café downtown.
all.zh: 最後他提議去市中心一家安靜的咖啡廳喝杯咖啡。

all.en: I said yes but chose a public place to feel safe.
all.zh: 我答應了，但選了一個公共場所讓自己比較安心。

all.en: After we said goodnight, I sat smiling at my phone for a while.
all.zh: 互道晚安後，我對著手機微笑了好一陣子。

all.en: Maybe online dating was not as scary as I had imagined.
all.zh: 也許網路交友並沒有我想像中那麼可怕。

all.en: On Saturday afternoon, I arrived at the café fifteen minutes earlier than planned.
all.zh: 星期六下午，我比約定時間提早十五分鐘抵達咖啡廳。

all.en: Daniel walked in wearing a navy sweater and a slightly nervous, friendly smile.
all.zh: 丹尼爾走進來，穿著深藍色毛衣，臉上帶著一絲緊張卻友善的微笑。

all.en: We ordered lattes and chocolate cake while choosing a table by the window.
all.zh: 我們點了拿鐵和巧克力蛋糕，並選了一張靠窗的桌子。

all.en: The conversation flowed easily, and three hours passed without either of us noticing.
all.zh: 談話流暢自然，三個小時過去了，我們兩個都沒察覺。

all.en: He showed me photos of a recent hike to a waterfall outside the city.
all.zh: 他給我看了最近一次到城外瀑布健行的照片。

all.en: I told him about my collection of vintage cookbooks from my grandmother's kitchen.
all.zh: 我向他介紹了我從祖母廚房繼承的復古食譜書收藏。

all.en: Before leaving, he asked if I would like to go hiking together next weekend.
all.zh: 離開前，他問我下週末要不要一起去健行。

all.en: I agreed, suggesting an easy trail since I was clearly the less experienced one.
all.zh: 我答應了，並建議走一條簡單的步道，畢竟我顯然是經驗較少的那位。

all.en: That night, I told my best friend every small detail of our meeting.
all.zh: 那晚，我把我們見面的每個小細節都告訴了我最好的朋友。

all.en: Maybe a quiet coffee date could really be the start of something special.
all.zh: 或許一場安靜的咖啡約會，真的能成為一段特別關係的開始。

all.en: The following Saturday, Daniel and I met at the trailhead with backpacks and sunscreen.
all.zh: 接下來那個星期六，我和丹尼爾在登山口會合，帶著背包和防曬乳。

all.en: He patiently taught me how to pace myself on the gentle uphill sections.
all.zh: 他耐心地教我如何在緩坡路段控制步伐。

all.en: We stopped at a small wooden bridge to take photos of the rushing stream below.
all.zh: 我們在一座小木橋上停下，為下方湍急的溪水拍照。

all.en: At the summit, Daniel surprised me with a thermos of homemade pumpkin soup.
all.zh: 抵達山頂時，丹尼爾拿出一壺自製南瓜湯給我，讓我又驚又喜。

all.en: We shared stories about our childhoods while watching clouds drift across the valley.
all.zh: 我們一邊看著雲朵飄過山谷，一邊分享童年的故事。

all.en: On the way down, he held my hand carefully over the slippery rocky parts.
all.zh: 下山時，他在濕滑的石頭路段小心地牽著我的手。

all.en: By sunset, we were already planning a longer overnight hike for the following month.
all.zh: 到了日落時分，我們已在規劃下個月一趟更長的過夜健行。

all.en: My best friend smiled knowingly when she heard the excitement in my voice.
all.zh: 我最好的朋友聽到我聲音中的興奮，會心地笑了。

all.en: Three months later, Daniel met my parents over a quiet Sunday family dinner.
all.zh: 三個月後，丹尼爾在一頓安靜的星期天家庭晚餐中見了我的父母。

all.en: What had started as a simple swipe had grown into a relationship full of laughter.
all.zh: 從一次簡單的滑動開始，竟發展成一段充滿歡笑的感情。

all.en: Six months after our first match, Daniel invited me to meet his closest friends.
all.zh: 我們配對成功的六個月後，丹尼爾邀請我認識他最要好的朋友們。

all.en: We gathered at a cozy Italian restaurant where his roommate worked as head chef.
all.zh: 我們在一家溫馨的義大利餐廳聚餐，他的室友在那裡擔任主廚。

all.en: His friends welcomed me warmly and shared embarrassing childhood stories about Daniel all evening.
all.zh: 他的朋友熱情地歡迎我，整晚分享丹尼爾尷尬的童年趣事。

all.en: I laughed until my cheeks hurt and felt completely accepted by his close circle.
all.zh: 我笑到臉頰發疼，並感受到自己被他親密的朋友圈完全接納。

all.en: The next month, Daniel and I adopted a gentle older rescue dog named Biscuit.
all.zh: 下個月，我和丹尼爾領養了一隻溫和的年長救援犬，名叫餅乾。

all.en: Biscuit loved hiking and slowly became part of our every weekend outdoor adventure.
all.zh: 餅乾喜愛健行，漸漸成為我們每個週末戶外探險的一份子。

all.en: My grandmother knitted a tiny sweater for Biscuit when winter winds arrived in November.
all.zh: 十一月寒風來襲時，祖母為餅乾織了一件小巧的毛衣。

all.en: Daniel proposed during a quiet sunrise hike at the very trail where we began.
all.zh: 丹尼爾在我們最初相約的那條步道上，於寧靜的日出時分向我求婚。

all.en: I said yes with tears, surrounded by mountains, soft mist, and chirping morning birds.
all.zh: 我含淚答應，四周是群山、輕霧和清晨啁啾的鳥鳴。

all.en: What had started with a single curious swipe had bloomed into a beautiful life.
all.zh: 從一次出於好奇的滑動開始，竟綻放成了一段美好的人生。

all.en: Our wedding took place in spring at the very waterfall trail Daniel had once photographed.
all.zh: 我們的婚禮在春天舉行，地點正是丹尼爾曾拍過照片的那條瀑布步道。

all.en: Biscuit served as our official ring bearer, wearing a tiny bow tie and matching collar.
all.zh: 餅乾擔任我們的正式持戒犬，戴著小小的領結和搭配的項圈。

all.en: My grandmother walked slowly down the forest aisle holding her hand-knitted bouquet wrap.
all.zh: 祖母緩緩走過森林中的紅毯，手中捧著她親手編織的捧花綁帶。

all.en: Daniel's roommate prepared a beautiful Italian feast served on long wooden outdoor tables.
all.zh: 丹尼爾的室友準備了豐盛的義大利美食，擺設在長長的戶外木桌上。

all.en: My best friend gave a speech recalling the night I first told her about the swipe.
all.zh: 我最好的朋友致詞時，回憶起我第一次告訴她那次滑動的夜晚。

all.en: Daniel surprised everyone by playing a soft jazz song he had quietly composed for me.
all.zh: 丹尼爾彈奏一首他默默為我譜寫的柔和爵士樂曲，讓所有人驚喜不已。

all.en: We danced barefoot on the mossy ground as evening mist gently wrapped around the trees.
all.zh: 我們赤腳在長滿苔蘚的地面上起舞，夜霧溫柔地環繞著樹梢。

all.en: A photographer captured a quiet moment of us laughing while Biscuit chased fallen petals.
all.zh: 攝影師捕捉到一個寧靜的瞬間，我們大笑著，餅乾正追逐著飄落的花瓣。

all.en: That photo later hung above our fireplace alongside a framed screenshot of our first chat.
all.zh: 那張照片後來掛在我們的壁爐上方，旁邊還框著我們第一段對話的截圖。

all.en: Every anniversary, we returned to that same trail with Biscuit to renew our gentle promises.
all.zh: 每逢結婚紀念日，我們都會帶著餅乾重返那條步道，溫柔地重新許下諾言。

all.en: On our fifth anniversary, we adopted a second small rescue dog with a quietly hesitant gentle temperament.
all.zh: 在我們的第五週年，我們領養了第二隻安靜害羞、性情溫柔的小型救援犬。

all.en: We named her Crumb because Biscuit had once been her tender, patient older shelter companion.
all.zh: 我們為她取名「碎屑」，因為「餅乾」曾是她在收容所裡溫柔耐心的年長同伴。

all.en: Crumb followed Biscuit everywhere, slowly learning courage from his quietly steady, gentle warm presence.
all.zh: 「碎屑」到處跟著「餅乾」，慢慢從牠安靜穩定、溫暖的陪伴中學會勇氣。

all.en: We returned to our anniversary trail with both dogs leashed gently between our quietly content soft hands.
all.zh: 我們帶著兩隻狗回到那條週年紀念步道，牽繩溫柔地繫在我們安靜滿足的柔軟雙手間。

all.en: Biscuit limped slightly because of his aging hips, but his quietly wagging tail told a happy story.
all.zh: 「餅乾」因為髖部老化稍微跛行，但牠安靜搖動的尾巴訴說著開心的故事。

all.en: Crumb stopped to sniff fallen cherry petals exactly where Biscuit had once joyfully chased them.
all.zh: 「碎屑」停下來嗅聞著飄落的櫻花瓣，正是「餅乾」當年歡快追逐花瓣的地方。

all.en: We took a new family photograph beside our framed first anniversary picture above the fireplace.
all.zh: 我們在壁爐上方第一張週年照片旁，拍下了一張新的全家福。

all.en: That evening, we wrote new gentle promises inside our small leather journal beside the older faded ones.
all.zh: 那天傍晚，我們在小皮革日誌裡，於泛黃的舊承諾旁，寫下新的溫柔約定。

all.en: Biscuit slept peacefully between our feet while Crumb curled quietly against his warm gentle rising chest.
all.zh: 「餅乾」安詳地睡在我們腳邊，「碎屑」則安靜地蜷在牠溫暖起伏的胸口旁。

all.en: One quiet first match had quietly grown into many gentle tails sleeping peacefully against each other's hearts.
all.zh: 一場安靜的初次配對，已悄悄成長為許多溫柔的尾巴，靜靜依偎在彼此心房旁睡去。

all.en: By our seventh anniversary, Biscuit passed peacefully in his sleep one quiet rainy autumn evening at home.
all.zh: 到了我們的第七週年，「餅乾」在一個安靜的秋日雨夜於家中安詳地睡夢中離世。

all.en: We buried him beneath the cherry tree where he had once chased petals on our wedding day.
all.zh: 我們把牠安葬在那棵櫻花樹下，那是牠在我們婚禮當天追逐花瓣的地方。

all.en: Crumb sat quietly beside his small grave for hours, refusing food until Daniel hand-fed her gently.
all.zh: 「碎屑」靜靜地在牠的小墓旁坐了好幾個小時，不肯進食，直到丹尼爾溫柔地親手餵她。

all.en: We added a tiny stone marker carved with his pawprint beside our framed wedding photograph indoors.
all.zh: 我們在屋內裱框的婚禮照片旁，加上一塊刻有牠腳印的小石碑。

all.en: Six months later, a shelter called about a tiny abandoned puppy who needed an experienced gentle home.
all.zh: 六個月後，一間收容所打電話來，說有一隻被遺棄的小幼犬需要經驗豐富的溫柔家庭。

all.en: We named her Crust, completing our quiet bakery-themed family of slowly healing tender canine hearts.
all.zh: 我們把她取名為「酥皮」，圓滿了我們以烘焙為主題、慢慢療癒中柔軟犬心的安靜家庭。

all.en: Crumb taught Crust how to chase petals exactly as Biscuit had once patiently taught her years ago.
all.zh: 「碎屑」教「酥皮」如何追逐花瓣，方式與多年前「餅乾」耐心教她的一模一樣。

all.en: Our framed first-chat screenshot still hangs above the fireplace, smudged slightly by many gentle puppy noses.
all.zh: 我們第一段對話的截圖仍裱框掛在壁爐上方，被許多溫柔的小狗鼻尖蹭得微微模糊。

all.en: Daniel wrote a quiet song about Biscuit and performed it softly during our eighth anniversary dinner.
all.zh: 丹尼爾為「餅乾」寫了一首安靜的歌，在我們第八週年晚餐時輕柔地演唱。

all.en: One curious midnight swipe had quietly grown into a tender bakery of warm hearts loving and grieving together.
all.zh: 一次午夜出於好奇的滑動，已悄悄成長為一間溫暖的麵包坊，溫柔的心在其中共同相愛與哀悼。

all.en: Our tenth wedding anniversary arrived quietly, marked by Biscuit's grandchildren now running across our small wooden backyard.
all.zh: 我們結婚十週年靜靜地到來，「餅乾」的孫輩們如今在我們小小的木製後院奔跑。

all.en: Daniel built a tiny memorial bench beneath the apple tree where Biscuit had once napped every warm summer afternoon.
all.zh: 丹尼爾在那棵蘋果樹下建了一張小小的紀念長椅，「餅乾」每個溫暖夏日午後都曾在那裡打盹。

all.en: Friends gathered for a quiet picnic, sharing soft stories of Biscuit, biscuits and the gentle decade we had shared.
all.zh: 朋友們聚在一起安靜地野餐，分享關於「餅乾」、餅乾與我們共度的溫柔十年的柔軟故事。

all.en: Our daughter, born during the fifth year, helped me bake a special anniversary cake decorated with tiny dog biscuit crumbs.
all.zh: 我們在第五年出生的女兒，幫我烘焙了一個特別的週年蛋糕，上面裝飾著小小的狗餅乾屑。

all.en: She placed a candle gently on the cake, blowing it out beside the framed first-chat screenshot above the fireplace.
all.zh: 她把蠟燭溫柔地放在蛋糕上，在壁爐上方那張裱框的第一段對話截圖旁吹熄了它。

all.en: Daniel sang his quiet Biscuit song one more time, and our daughter joined gently on a small wooden recorder.
all.zh: 丹尼爾又一次輕聲唱起他為「餅乾」寫的安靜歌曲，我們的女兒用小小的木製直笛溫柔地伴奏。

all.en: Neighbors waved from across the fence, sharing freshly baked muffins through the gentle warm summer evening breeze.
all.zh: 鄰居們隔著籬笆揮手，透過溫柔溫暖的夏夜微風遞來剛烤好的瑪芬蛋糕。

all.en: We wrote a small joint anniversary letter to our future selves, hiding it inside a tin beneath the memorial bench.
all.zh: 我們合寫了一封小小的週年信給未來的自己，藏進紀念長椅下方的鐵盒裡。

all.en: Daniel softly promised to dig the letter up only on our twenty-fifth anniversary, no matter what life might bring us.
all.zh: 丹尼爾輕聲承諾，無論未來生活如何，都只在我們二十五週年時才挖出這封信。

all.en: One curious midnight swipe had truly grown into a quiet backyard bakery of warm biscuits, biscuit memories and tender vows.
all.zh: 一次午夜出於好奇的滑動，已真正成長為一間安靜的後院麵包坊，承載著溫暖的餅乾、餅乾的回憶與溫柔的誓言。

all.en: I still cannot believe I almost deleted the app right after our first awkward five-minute silence on the chat.
all.zh: 我到現在還是不敢相信，我們在聊天裡第一次尷尬地沉默五分鐘後，我差點就把那個 App 刪掉。

all.en: Daniel still teases me about the typo in my very first hello message that haunted me for weeks.
all.zh: 丹尼爾到現在還拿我第一句哈囉打錯字的事虧我，那讓我心煩了好幾個禮拜。

all.en: Our daughter loves hearing about how mommy and daddy met through a tiny picture on a phone screen.
all.zh: 我們的女兒最愛聽媽媽和爸爸是怎麼透過手機螢幕上的一張小照片認識的故事。

all.en: I keep my old phone in a drawer just so I can show her the original screenshot one day.
all.zh: 我把我那支舊手機收在抽屜裡，就為了將來某天可以拿給她看那張原始截圖。

all.en: Last weekend, my younger sister asked me for honest advice before trying her very first dating app.
all.zh: 上週末，我妹妹在第一次嘗試交友軟體前，問了我一些真心話的建議。

all.en: I told her to always pick a busy coffee shop and to text me the address ten minutes before.
all.zh: 我跟她說一定要挑人多的咖啡店，並且在十分鐘前把地址傳給我。

all.en: Daniel still makes pumpkin soup every single autumn, and the thermos is exactly the same one as before.
all.zh: 丹尼爾每年秋天還是會煮南瓜湯，那個保溫瓶居然還是當年那個。

all.en: Yesterday, Crumb finally let our daughter brush her tail, after three patient years of slowly building trust together.
all.zh: 昨天，「碎屑」終於肯讓我們女兒幫她梳尾巴，經過了三年慢慢建立信任的耐心歲月。

all.en: I sometimes wonder how many couples that night had also been swiping at the very same midnight hour.
all.zh: 我有時會想，那一晚到底有多少對情侶，也在同一個午夜時分滑著手機。

all.en: Love really can start with one nervous tap on a screen, and I now tell anyone who will listen.
all.zh: 愛情真的可以從螢幕上一次緊張的點擊開始，我現在只要有人願意聽我都會講。
